Document:
# Proto-Diona
While a Proto-Diona is a rare sight to behold, it's not impossible. Transhumanism exists even among plant-like races, although the practice is typically shunned.
## Resistances - Receive [color=#ffa500]65% more heat damage[/color] and [color=#8147ff]30% more shock damage[/color]. - Receive [color=#65807d]25% less slash damage[/color], [color=#FF3636]20% less blunt damage[/color], and [color=#1e90ff]35% less cold damage[/color].
[color=red]WARNING![/color] Splitting into nymphs as a Proto-Diona will [color=red]turn you back into a normal Diona![/color] Choose carefully, is it really worth it to lose your cybernetics?
